content.content: Cannot create a worktree: not in a git repository and no WorktreeCreate hooks are configured. Configure WorktreeCreate/WorktreeRemove hooks in settings.json to use worktree isolation with other VCS systems.

toolUseResult: Error: Cannot create a worktree: not in a git repository and no WorktreeCreate hooks are configured. Configure WorktreeCreate/WorktreeRemove hooks in settings.json to use worktree isolation with other VCS systems.
